creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
I also suggest fixing warnings from portclippy:
# PORTNAME block
PORTNAME
+DISTVERSIONPREFIX
DISTVERSION
-DISTVERSIONPREFIX
PORTEPOCH
CATEGORIES

# Maintainer block
MAINTAINER
COMMENT
WWW

# License block
LICENSE

# Dependencies
BUILD_DEPENDS
LIB_DEPENDS
TEST_DEPENDS

# USES block
+USES
+CPE_VENDOR
USE_GITHUB
GH_ACCOUNT
GH_PROJECT
+GH_SUBDIR
GH_TAGNAME
-GH_SUBDIR
-CPE_VENDOR
-USES
USE_LDCONFIG

# Make block
+TEST_TARGET

# Packaging list block
PLIST_SUB

# Options definitions
OPTIONS_DEFINE
OPTIONS_SUB

# Options descriptions
DAEMON_DESC

# Options helpers
+DAEMON_LIB_DEPENDS
DAEMON_CMAKE_ON
-DAEMON_LIB_DEPENDS
TEST_CMAKE_ON

-TEST_TARGET
